# numberOfColumns

**Instance Property**

The number of columns if section content is displayed in a grid layout.

## Declaration

```swift
var numberOfColumns: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

The number of columns informs the suggested layout of the content, in resolution-independent grid space units. One grid space unit is defined as the width of the project canvas divided by `numberOfColumns`.

## Determining Content Properties

- **elements**: An array of asset, text, or journal entry elements contained in the content.
- **aspectRatio**: The aspect ratio of the full content layout, defined as width over height.
- **cloudAssetIdentifiers**: An array containing all cloud asset identifiers referenced in the content.
- **backgroundColor**: The background color of the section content when created from an Apple Print Product.
